steps.content: Convert square feet to square meters: since $1 \text{ m} = 3.28 \text{ ft}$, we have $1 \text{ m}^{2} = (3.28)^{2} \text{ ft}^{2} = 10.7584 \text{ ft}^{2}$.
Convert hours to minutes: $1 \text{ hr} = 60 \text{ min}$.

choices.explanation: • 0.51 is the closest value to 0.511. That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
• 1.68 would result from dividing 330 by 3.28 and then by 60, applying only a linear (not squared) conversion for area. Not correct.
• 18.04 would result from multiplying 330 by 3.28 and then dividing by 60, using the linear conversion in the wrong direction. Not correct.
• 30.67 would result from dividing 330 by 10.7584 with no per-minute conversion (rate stays per hour). Not correct.

steps.content: Apply both conversions: $330 \frac{\text{ft}^{2}}{\text{hr}} \times \frac{1 \text{ m}^{2}}{10.7584 \text{ ft}^{2}} \times \frac{1 \text{ hr}}{60 \text{ min}} = \frac{330}{10.7584 \times 60} \approx \frac{330}{645.5} \approx 0.511 \frac{\text{m}^{2}}{\text{min}}$. Evaluate each choice.
